channel.title: Community Leadership on Vandana Verma
channel.description: Recent content in Community Leadership on Vandana Verma

item.title: OWASP Bangalore - Official LinkedIn Group Notice
item.description: Public LinkedIn community notice by Vandana Verma clarifying the official OWASP Bangalore group and warning about an unaffiliated fake group.

item.title: OWASP LLM Security Verification Standard Leadership
item.description: Leadership on the OWASP LLM Security Verification Standard, connecting application security and secure AI development.

item.title: OWASP MCP Top 10 Leadership
item.description: Leadership work on the OWASP MCP Top 10, focused on emerging security risks around AI agents and MCP ecosystems.

item.title: OWASP Project Leadership
item.description: A current public snapshot of active OWASP leadership across multiple projects and community initiatives.

item.title: OWASP Compliance Leadership
item.description: Current governance and compliance work within OWASP, including the public appointment as Compliance Officer.

item.title: President, InfosecGirls
item.description: Founder and President of InfosecGirls, building a global cybersecurity community through mentorship, workshops, and inclusive learning.

item.title: OWASP Board Service
item.description: A public timeline reference for board service and long-running governance leadership within OWASP.

item.title: OWASP Podcast
item.description: Co-hosting the OWASP Podcast and helping spotlight community conversations, updates, and project work.

item.title: OWASP Spotlight Series Leadership
item.description: Leadership behind the OWASP Spotlight Series, featuring projects and contributors from across the OWASP ecosystem.
